title: Hyderabad advocate killed as tanker overturns on BMW
content: A senior advocate from Hyderabad, B Srinivasa Rao, tragically died when a fly ash tanker overturned onto his car at the Keesara toll plaza. The tanker reportedly lost control due to brake failure, crushing the BMW. Rescue operations were challenging due to the severe impact.

title: 23-year-old UP woman dies after jilted lover throws acid on her
content: A 23-year-old woman died and her mother is in critical condition after a jilted lover allegedly threw acid on them while they slept. The accused, who had a relationship with the victim, reportedly conspired with an associate to carry out the attack after her marriage was fixed elsewhere. Police have arrested two individuals in connection with the incident.

title: France to drop Windows: Government to shift to Linux; EU pushes digital sovereignty
content: France is ditching Microsoft Windows for Linux, a significant step in Europe's push for digital sovereignty and reduced reliance on American tech giants. This move, aimed at regaining control over data and digital infrastructure, aligns with broader EU efforts to lessen dependence on foreign technology. The initiative begins with government digital agencies, signaling a strategic shift in national digital policy.

title: Haiti stampede: 30 killed at historic Citadelle Laferrière
content: A deadly stampede at Haiti's Citadelle Laferrière on Saturday claimed at least 30 lives as crowds gathered for an annual celebration. Overcrowding and rainfall contributed to the tragedy at the historic fortress, with many young people among the victims. Officials are responding to the scene, and the death toll may increase.

title: 'Going to have big problems': Trump warns China on reports of weapons shipments to Iran
content: Donald Trump asserted US military dominance over Iran, claiming to have dismantled its capabilities and warning China against supplying weapons.  Despite ongoing peace talks mediated by Pakistan, Trump declared victory regardless of a deal, emphasizing America's win and control over key shipping routes.

title: Two years after Google CEO Sundar Pichai’s ‘Code Red’, Satya Nadella orders AI overhaul
content: Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella has initiated a 'Copilot code red' to enhance AI performance and user experience, aiming to boost investor confidence amidst intense competition.  The company is allocating significant cloud capacity to Copilot development, with analysts suggesting Azure can still exceed expectations due to growing demand and pricing.

title: ‘Dhurandhar 2’ day 24: Ranveer Singh film nears Rs 1,700 cr
content: Ranveer Singh's spy drama 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' has achieved remarkable box office success, nearing Rs 1,070 crore in India net collections. The film experienced a significant surge of over 90% on its 24th day, pushing its worldwide business towards Rs 1,700 crore.

title: PM Modi writes to parties, seeks support on women's quota bills
content: Prime Minister Modi has urged all party floor leaders to support the unanimous passage of women's reservation bills next week, aiming for implementation by the 2029 elections. The government seeks to enact the Nari Shakti Vandan Adhiniyam, which will reserve one-third of Lok Sabha and assembly seats for women.

title: Laid-off techies battle EMIs; ex-engineer rides Rapido, Oracle staff speak out
content: A former software engineer, once earning Rs 40 lakh annually, now rides for Rapido in NCR to manage a Rs 95,000 monthly home loan EMI after a sudden layoff. This stark career shift highlights the precariousness of high-income tech jobs and the risks of substantial debt, leaving many professionals questioning their financial security in volatile times.

title: Pro-Palestine rally: Over 500 arrested in London for protesting
content: London police arrested over 500 individuals during a pro-Palestinian demonstration. The arrests were made for showing support for Palestine Action, a group proscribed in the UK. This action follows a High Court ruling that questioned the ban's legality. Organizers criticized the police action, citing the court's decision. The ban on Palestine Action has led to numerous arrests since its inception.

title: IPL controversy: RR manager violates protocol by using phone in dugout
content: Rajasthan Royals manager Romi Bhinder was seen using a phone in the dugout during an IPL match, violating PMOA rules that ban such use outside the dressing room. The incident, noticed during the chase, has drawn scrutiny, with potential action from officials. IPL authorities stress strict phone-use guidelines to prevent corruption risks, and an investigation may follow.

title: 13 dead as speeding bus collides with van in Bihar's Katihar
content: In a devastating accident on National Highway-31 in Katihar district, Bihar, a bus and van collided head-on, resulting in the loss of 13 lives and injuring 22 others. The van was transporting members of the tribal community back from Jharkhand when it was hit by a bus driven by an alleged drunk driver.

title: Teen sold postcards outside Angkor Wat and spoke 12 languages; Where is he now?
content: A Cambodian teenager, Thuch Salik, gained global fame for his remarkable ability to converse in over a dozen languages while selling postcards at Angkor Wat. This viral talent led to a life-changing scholarship in China, offering him formal education and a brighter future. His story highlights the transformative power of opportunity and resilience.

title: '50-second meeting': Samson reveals CSK's turning point after hat-trick of losses
content: Sanju Samson ended his early-season slump with a match-winning unbeaten 115 for Chennai Super Kings against Delhi Capitals. His century, coupled with Ayush Mhatre's 59, powered CSK to 212 and secured their first win of IPL 2026. Samson expressed gratitude for the team's trust and support after the crucial performance.

title: SIR: Dead woman on voters list but husband, son off in Bengal
content: A 77-year-old woman, Mina Jalal, passed away before her name was cleared by the EC for voter registration, an irony as she had voted previously. Her husband and son were excluded from the voter list after adjudication, while other family members qualified. The family, residing in Kolkata for decades, faces harassment and lack of transparency from the EC.

title: Rare Modi-Rahul interaction breaks the internet
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi and Opposition leader Rahul Gandhi shared a rare moment of pleasantries and a brief chat at a recent event, sparking interest. Gandhi's presence at the commemorative program for Jyotirao Phule, where he greeted the PM, was noteworthy.

title: Mamata alleges bid to cancel her nomination in Bhowanipore
content: West Bengal CM Mamata Banerjee alleged attempts to cancel her Bhowanipore nomination through "false affidavits" filed by "traitors." Two objections, including a name mismatch and allegations of old criminal cases, were rejected. A third issue regarding ballot logistics was also resolved, ensuring her name remained on the first EVM.

title: Net deletions due to SIR 5.2cr (10%) in 12 states/UTs; 2 crore included in Phase 2
content: Over 2 crore new voters joined electoral rolls across 12 states and UTs during intensive revision, while nearly 5.2 crore names were deleted. This purification process, aimed at ensuring accurate voter lists and preventing bogus voting, resulted in 45.8 crore electors remaining. Andaman & Nicobar Islands and Uttar Pradesh saw the highest purification percentages.

title: Dianna Russini’s ‘Miami’ remark sparks outrage; denies Vrabel affair
content: Mike Vrabel, the New England Patriots’ head coach, and The New York Times’ popular NFL reporter and insider, Dianna Russini, have sparked outrage among millions after pictures of them sitting together at an upscale hotel were leaked to the media. Both Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini have strongly denied any rumors of an affair and continue to maintain they were in a professional setting surrounded by other people. Amid all the mess, Dianna Russini’s old remarks have raised eyebrows.

title: Who is Jennifer Vrabel? Mike Vrabel’s wife amid affair rumours
content: Mike Vrabel, the New England Patriots’ head coach, has sparked outrage as many are convinced that he has allegedly cheated on his wife, Jennifer Vrabel, with The New York Times’ Dianna Russini. While both Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini have strongly denied affair rumors, the head coach’s wife has stayed out of the spotlight even as they have been married for 27 years.

title: Stephen Curry, Ayesha Curry make noble move, continue giving back
content: Stephen Curry, the NBA legend, sparked shockwaves when he ended his decade long partnership with Under Armour in 2025, after over 10 years of being with the brand exclusively. While Stephen Curry remained vague about the reason behind it, it seems there was a pretty noble thought that led to this decision and his wife, Ayesha Curry, has been a supporter through all of it.

title: Delegates from 22 countries laud India's poll process
content: International delegates from 22 countries lauded India's recent elections in Kerala, Assam, and Puducherry, highlighting impressive voter turnout and meticulous planning. Witnessing firsthand the seamless execution, including EVM usage and webcasting, they described the process as a "true festival of democracy." Delegates also noted the well-organized polling stations with facilities and praised the transparency measures in place.

title: Big share of funds for kids' jabs not spent: RTI data
content: Despite significant annual allocations for India's National Immunisation Programme, a substantial portion of funds remains unspent, raising concerns about implementation efficiency. While vaccine coverage has improved, RTI data reveals consistent spending shortfalls, highlighting a need for better fund utilization and accountability in this crucial public health initiative.

title: 'Big khela' coming to Bengal, declares PM Modi
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi intensified the BJP's Bengal campaign, challenging the TMC's "khela hobe" slogan and framing the polls as a fight for Bengal's identity. He promised to implement the Uniform Civil Code to end appeasement politics and vowed accountability for those who have "played far too long."

title: Hormuz mine clearance, 'some headway' on Lebanon: What we know so far on US-Iran talks
content: The United States and Iran have commenced direct negotiations in Pakistan following a fragile ceasefire, marking a rare face-to-face engagement. Discussions are reportedly making headway, particularly on developments in Lebanon. Key issues on the table include Iran's nuclear program, ballistic missiles, regional influence, and control over the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Vijay's film not leaked from our system: CBFC
content: The Central Board of Film Certification has refuted claims of the Tamil film 'Jana Nayagan' leaking from its system, stating its certification process is secure. The board clarified that films are handed over to producers via a secure KDM mechanism. The alleged leak, which surfaced online, has sparked outrage and calls for stricter anti-piracy measures within the industry.

title: Avenge Mamata's insult to Murmu, Shah calls upon tribal community
content: Union Minister Amit Shah urged Bengal's tribal communities to vote against TMC, alleging Mamata Banerjee insulted President Droupadi Murmu. Speaking in tribal-dominated districts, Shah promised a "son of soil" CM and inclusion of Kurmali and Rajbanshi in the Eighth Schedule, while also criticizing TMC for corruption and alleged land grabs by infiltrators.

title: IAF chief meets top US def officials to discuss shared strategic priorities, MQ-9B drones
content: Indian Air Force Chief Air Chief Marshal A P Singh met with US Air Force leadership, including Gen Ken Wilsbach, to bolster defense ties and discuss shared strategic goals. Key topics included the procurement of MQ-9B Sky Guardian drones and enhancing Indo-Pacific cooperation.

title: Duty on diesel exports hiked from Rs 21.5/L to Rs 55.5
content: The government has significantly increased export duties on diesel and aviation turbine fuel to prioritize domestic availability amidst West Asian tensions.  Diesel export duty rose by over 150% to Rs 55.5 per litre, and ATF to Rs 42 per litre, aiming to deter exports and ensure sufficient supply within India.

title: 6.5 yrs after bifurcation, J&K removed from Aadhaar records of Ladakh residents
content: After a six-year delay, Aadhaar records for Ladakh residents now correctly reflect 'Ladakh' instead of 'Jammu & Kashmir' in the state field. This long-pending correction, facilitated by the UT administration and UIDAI, resolves significant inconveniences faced by residents in accessing services and verifying their identity.

title: 'SIR is a big scam to bring BJP to office'
content: West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee has accused the Election Commission's Special Summary Revision (SIR) of being a "big scam" orchestrated to help the BJP win. She alleged indiscriminate voter deletion, disproportionately affecting Hindus, and claimed over 250 deaths occurred during the exercise.

title: Govt mulls sending surplus rice as aid to conflict-hit Iran
content: India is poised to permit wheat exports to Egypt, Indonesia, and Myanmar due to surplus stocks. Rice shipments, including to war-torn Iran on humanitarian grounds, are also being considered. This move aims to free up storage space for upcoming winter crops and capitalize on increased demand amid global supply chain disruptions.

title: Stephen Curry, Ayesha Curry hit $150K milestone for a cause
content: Stephen Curry, the Golden State Warriors’ star player, and his wife, Ayesha Curry, have always been passionate about helping society and have always been charity driven and trying to help out children from their hometown, Oakland. Despite the wealth and fame that surround the high profile couple, both Stephen Curry and his wife, Ayesha Curry, remain passionate about the causes they believe in.

title: Indian LPG tanker crosses Hormuz, first after ceasefire
content: The Indian-flagged LPG tanker Jag Vikram successfully navigated the Strait of Hormuz, marking the first Indian vessel to pass through the conflict zone since a temporary ceasefire. This vessel, carrying 20,400 tonnes of cooking gas, is expected to reach Mumbai on April 15.

title: No forum to deal with arbitrators' misdeeds: SC judge
content: Supreme Court Justice B.V. Nagarathna emphasized that arbitration and mediation are vital to a modern justice system, not just alternatives to court. She noted a gap in addressing complaints against arbitrators, often retired judges, whom courts are hesitant to remove.  Maintaining litigant trust is crucial, as bias allegations erode confidence in these dispute resolution methods.

title: IPL: Samson's 115, Overton’s 4-fer help CSK beat DC for season's first win
content: Sanju Samson’s unbeaten 115 powered Chennai Super Kings to their first IPL 2026 win, beating Delhi Capitals by 23 runs. He shared a 113-run stand with Ayush Mhatre (59) to post 212/2. Delhi started strong but lost momentum after early wickets. Jamie Overton’s 4/18 ensured CSK sealed a comfortable victory despite Tristan Stubbs’ fighting 60.

title: Assam turnout nears record 86%, highest rise in Muslim-majority districts
content: Assam witnessed a record-breaking voter turnout of nearly 86% in the 2026 assembly polls, the highest in the state's history. The Muslim belt saw the most significant increase in participation. Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma expressed confidence in an NDA victory, citing strong support from the Sanatani community.

title: Legendary singer Asha Bhosle suffers chest infection; admitted to Mumbai hospital
content: Legendary singer Asha Bhosle was rushed to the hospital on Saturday night. Reports confirm she suffered a heart attack. She is currently admitted to Breach Candy Hospital in Mumbai. Bhosle, a celebrated voice in Indian music, has had a career spanning over seven decades. Her vast filmography includes thousands of songs across various languages.

title: J&K: Dogs maul 8-year-old girl to death in Sopore
content: An eight-year-old girl was tragically mauled to death by dogs in Sopore's Seloo village, marking the second such fatality in the area within a year. The child suffered severe injuries in an apple orchard attack. Local residents are shaken, with some alleging dog relocation is exacerbating the problem.

title: Horoscope: Daily astrological predictions for today
content: Horoscope Today: Read daily horoscope predictions for April 12, 2026. Know all about the astrological events and influences that will be affecting each of the 12 zodiac signs. Our astrologer has analyzed the movements of the planets and the alignment of the stars to bring you the most accurate and up-to-date horoscope predictions for the day ahead. Get ready to discover what the stars have in store for you today.

title: BJK Cup: India win the battle, lose the war and fail to make playoffs
content: India beat Korea 2-1 to win their fifth and final tie in the Billie Jean King Cup. India had to win 3-0 and needed other result to go their way, but neither worked out. India finished third in the group and will not qualify for the playoffs.

title: How Rory McIlroy's Saturday stumble sets up a dramatic Sunday at the Masters
content: After losing the biggest 36-hole lead in Masters history, McIlroy and Augusta will have another spin Sunday.

title: Moving day: Young ties Rory amid Masters drama
content: Cameron Young, who started the day eight back of Rory McIlroy, shot a 7-under 65 and is tied with the defending champion entering the final round of the Masters.

title: Fury dominates Makhmudov, calls out Joshua
content: Tyson Fury shook off some ring rust on his comeback to earn a unanimous points win over Arslanbek Makhmudov on Saturday and potentially set up a long-awaited clash with Anthony Joshua.

title: Denver wins third NCAA hockey title in five years
content: The Denver Pioneers of the National Collegiate Hockey Conference registered a 2-1 victory over the Wisconsin Badgers to complete the Frozen Four at T-Mobile Arena on Saturday in Las Vegas, the program's third national championship in five years.

title: Seeing red: Augusta 'gettable' as field sets mark
content: Ten players shot a 68 or better at the Masters on Saturday as the field's average score of 70.63 set a third-round record. Russell Henley said: "The course is gettable."

title: 'That's not him': Lindor's gaffes leave Mets at loss
content: Mets shortstop Francisco Lindor had his third miscue in two days Saturday in an 11-6 loss to the A's, and manager Carlos Mendoza acknowledged the uncharacteristic lapses were "hard to explain."

title: Deion's health is 'good,' as CU plays spring game
content: After a season that saw Colorado go 3-9, Buffaloes coach Deion Sanders, 58, was hands-on as he watched his team scrimmage on Saturday at the spring game, telling reporters that "I'm good, I'm good," after being diagnosed with bladder cancer last year.

title: May agrees to new deal, Michigan AD Manuel says
content: Michigan coach Dusty May has agreed to a new deal that will have him continuing to lead the Wolverines "for many years to come," athletic director Warde Manuel said Saturday.

title: 🏀 NBA postseason intel: Big questions, more
content: Are the Lakers toast? Is the Spurs' 3-point prowess real? We canvass the league on six storylines that could define the postseason.

title: Breaking down Cal Raleigh's first 55 plate appearances of 2026 -- and what's gone wrong for the Mariners
content: Seattle's biggest stars have struggled at the plate as the team has gotten off to rough start this season. How real are the concerns? Let's find out.

title: MLB Power Rankings: Brewers, Pirates rise as Red Sox fall in Week 2
content: Teams with championship hopes fall down our list while unexpected contenders have made surprise starts.

title: Which of the NFL draft's QBs will be elite? We projected the top five prospects
content: Aaron Schatz uses his QBASE 2.0 model to project NFL career ceilings and floors for the 2026 draft class' QBs.

title: 'It's the new frontier': How AI is pushing NFL draft prep to 'a different level'
content: When a prospect skips combine workouts, teams can use artificial intelligence to project his measurables.

title: King's gambit: Why NBA players are turning to chess
content: NBA players are spending more time than ever working on the boards -- but we're not talking rebounds.

title: NBA playoff watch: What's at stake on Sunday
content: We break down every seeding possibility, plus a look at the race to secure the best odds for the No. 1 pick.

title: UFC 327 LIVE: Results and analysis for Jiří Procházka vs. Carlos Ulberg
content: Follow the action from UFC 327 in Miami, including Jiří Procházka vs. Carlos Ulberg for the UFC light heavyweight championship.

title: UCLA and its six seniors are eyeing a WNBA draft takeover
content: Can UCLA make history and have all six seniors -- who scored all of the team's points at the Final Four -- drafted in the WNBA?

title: WNBA draft preview: The case for every potential No. 1 pick
content: Will Lauren Betts, Awa Fam, Azzi Fudd or Olivia Miles go No. 1, and which transfers boosted their draft stock?

title: Fury, Joshua and Wilder are back, what's next for the glamour division?
content: Tyson Fury won and called out Anthony Joshua, and with Deontay Wilder back, the heavyweight division is buzzing.

title: Arsenal ratings: Havertz, Martinelli 4/10 in loss to Bournemouth that hits title hopes
content: Arsenal's Premier League title ambitions suffered a huge blow at the hands of Bournemouth, as the Gunners succumbed to a shock 2-1 defeat at home.

title: Free agency grades: Sizing up the Eagles' Dontayvion Wicks trade and more
content: We're handing out report cards on big moves, including the Raiders' Kirk Cousins deal and the Eagles' Dontayvion Wicks trade.

title: From Cyndi Lauper to 'The Man': The evolution of women's wrestling at WrestleMania
content: Dive into how women's professional wrestling has evolved on WWE's biggest stage over the past 40 years.

title: Free agency turns 50: Ranking the best -- and worst -- signings in MLB history
content: The first free agent contract ever was signed 50 years ago today. We rate the 8,340 deals of the past half-century.

title: Rankings: Top 100 players for 2026
content: Plan for the 2026 Fantasy Women's Basketball season with the top 100 rankings, including player position ranks.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Man United scouting Diomande, Ndiaye
content: Manchester United have shortlisted attackers Yan Diomande and Iliman Ndiaye ahead of the summer transfer window. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Centre raises export duties on diesel, aviation turbine fuel
content: The Government hikes windfall tax on diesel to ₹55.5 per litre and ATF ₹42 per litre with immediate effect

title: Scientific temper, rational thinking key to eradicating caste, says Chief Minister Siddaramaiah
content: The Chief Minister cautioned against divisive forces that seek to create discord in the name of religion and caste

title: Haryana Police takes down over 6,000 links and apps in campaign against objectional online content
content: The DGP announced that strict action will be taken against content glorifying weapons, promoting violence, and displaying obscene content involving women and children

title: Prototype fast breeder reactor | Nuclear paradox
content: A milestone in India’s nuclear ambitions, but one shadowed by limited oversight and persistent concerns over transparency and accountability

title: In Punjab, open wounds from hit jobs on Ambedkar statues
content: The recurring desecration of Dr. B.R. Ambedkar’s statues in the State is being seen as a deliberate attempt to fracture the Dalit-Sikh social fabric. Vikas Vasudeva finds that as Ambedkar Jayanti nears, people from both communities are determined to ensure that divisive forces do not fracture their relationship in a State where Scheduled Castes constitute 32% of the population

title: What is the SIR controversy in West Bengal | Explained
content: How many names have been deleted from the electoral rolls, and why? What are the logical discrepancies identified by the ECI? Why were large numbers of voters placed under adjudication, and how was this resolved? How has the SIR process reshaped the State’s political contest?

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election 2026: Dairy farmers concerned over lack of attention to their core issues
content: In its manifesto, the DMK has promised the farmers that the procurement price will be increased by ₹5 per litre. But the AIADMK, the NTK, and the TVK have not set out their position on the issue, says M.G. Rajendran

title: I am enduring pain fighting the party I built brick by bric: PMK founder S. Ramadoss
content: S. Ramadoss says he is not opposing the ‘Mango’ symbol, and contends that it is his symbol and was created by him. Describing the court verdict on the party dispute as ‘different’, he says the  Anbumani faction is making it seem as if the ‘Mango’ symbol and the party did not belong to him

title: T.N. Assembly election 2026: Scheduled Tribe communities in delta region hope for redemption from poverty under new government
content: In the absence of accepted identity proof, the Tamil Nadu Adi Dravidar Housing and Development Corporation has been holding back fund allocation to ST families, say activists

title: Kalapriya: from a DMK campaigner and fan of MGR to renowned littérateur
content: Kalapriya says that before joining the DMK, MGR was associated with the Congress. Over the time, he surrounded himself with seasoned political minds, including communist leaders K.  Baladhandayutham  and  Kalyanasundaram. He was further supported by experienced figures such as K.A. Krishnaswamy  and Panruti S. Ramachandran. This combination of cinematic influence and political acumen gave him an exceptional grasp of governance as well as mass psychology.

title: 13 killed, 30 injured in multi-vehicle collision in Bihar’s Katihar
content: The collision involved a bus, a truck, and a pickup van; the bus driver may have lost control of the vehicle, leading to the accident, the police say

title: Tamil Nadu voter deleted from electoral roll reminds Supreme Court of promise to protect in case of ‘mass exclusion’
content: The petitioner, C. Geetha, said her name had been a mainstay in the State’s electoral roll over the years; she was even intending to contest as an independent candidate in the 51-Uthangarai (SC) Assembly Constituency and 52-Bargur Assembly Constituency in the Tamil Nadu Assembly elections in 2026.

title: CM Fadnavis to conduct probe in Chhagan Bhujbal’s helicopter landing in parking lot
content: According to officials from the Pune administration, a designated helipad had been prepared for VIP helicopter landings. However, the pilot mistakenly landed in an open space in the parking area, mistaking it for the designated site

title: Puducherry Assembly election 2026: High enthusiasm, long queues mark polling as the Union Territory shatters record
content: There were no major complaints pertaining to polling process; however, there were allegations of voter inducement and reports of minor scuffles from two constituencies during the early hours of polling.

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election 2026: Over 4,600 candidates in fray across State
content: Karur has the highest number of contestants in a single constituency, with 85 candidates in the race; there were 47 candidates in Perambur, including TVK president C. Joseph Vijay

title: Anaicut: Predominantly tribal constituency long plagued by neglect of basic infrastructure
content: Civic amenities such as bitumen roads, water supply, electricity connection and government hospital still remain a distant dream for residents of many tribal hamlets in the hills

title: From the margins to momentum: the BJP’s electoral journey in Tamil Nadu
content: The BJP initially capitalised on Hindutva politics in Kanniyakumari, winning its first Assembly seat in 1996; thereafter it tasted success only in alliance with the Dravidian majors; hopes to convert its rising vote share to more seats in 2026

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election 2026: Congress releases manifesto; D.K. Shivakumar hits out at Vijay’s remarks
content: He terms the TVK president an ‘immature politician’ in response to the latter claiming that the ‘real Congress’ was with his party at a public meeting in Tirunelveli recently

title: No move yet to reinstate one-way traffic norms on service roads in Kozhikode city
content: Stretch near Thondayad Junction emerges as one of the most affected areas. Multiple entry and exit points beneath the Thondayad flyover have compounded traffic snarls, say residents

title: Musiri constituency, a fertile region on the banks of Cauvery, looks for a major thrust to development
content: Over the years, Musiri, which was upgraded as a 24-ward municipality in 2022, has transitioned into a ‘retiree paradise’ as it has become a preferred destination for superannuated professionals; agriculture remains the predominant occuption in the region fed by the Cauvery

title: Rahul Gandhi, other Congress leaders to campaign in T.N. soon
content: Campaign details of party chief Kharge, Rahul, and Priyanka will be released soon, says AICC in-charge for Tamil Nadu Girish Chodankar

title: Despite having nine large waterbodies, Pallavaram constituency residents do not get clean groundwater
content: They say that if the government removes encroachments and brings excess water from Chembarambakkam to the lakes in the constituency, the drinking water problem can be solved; another issue is that stray animal population keeps rising though the authorities take steps to catch them

title: Discharge of effluents from leather tanneries sparks pollution concern
content: At present, the Ambur Assembly constituency has over 50 leather tanneries with most of them located near the Palar River

title: T.N. election: AIADMK’s promise of crop loan waiver raises questions of feasibility
content: The AIADMK’s scheme covers crop loans obtained by farmers from primary agricultural credit cooperative societies (PACCS) and loans obtained by persons with disabilities and pavement vendors from cooperative banks

title: L-G: Chandni Chowk revamp has begun
content: Lieutenant Governor Taranjit Singh Sandhu stressed the need for coordination among agencies, and said the Delhi Police, the Municipal Corporation of Delhi and the Public Works Department had been directed to work together to address local challenges.

title: Postal ballot voting for senior citizens, persons with disabilities begins in Vellore
content: Election officials said that 5,673 persons with disabilities and senior citizens in five Assembly constituencies are to cast postal ballots

title: Edappadi K. Palaniswami, the lone star of AIADMK election campaign, steps up his pitch for power
content: The former Chief Minister is the main campaigner for the AIADMK across Tamil Nadu, with a stump speech focused on law and order issues, the State’s finances, concerns of government employees, drug menace, and rising inflation; he also highlights features of the manifesto of his party

title: Centre meets seafood exporters, offers support
content: The meeting noted that India’s seafood exports have crossed a new milestone, growing from ₹62,000 crore last year to approximately ₹68,000 crore this year, reflecting a net increase of about ₹6,000 crore

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election 2026: Southern districts, once known as a laggard, seek to shed the bad image
content: In the last eight months, two important developments took place in Thoothukudi itself: the establishment of an electric vehicle plant and the commissioning of the first 660-MW supercritical thermal power plant. The Thoothukudi port has initiated tendering for the outer harbour

title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: Palaniswami is coasting along with PMK’s support in Edappadi
content: The DMK won in the constituency in 1967 and 1971. Thereafter, the AIADMK has won seven times, out of which Mr. Palaniswami  has won five times. Farming is a major occupation of the people of the constituency, which covers Edappadi taluk, a portion of Mettur taluk, Konganapuram, Nangavalli and  Jalakandapuram town panchayats

title: T.N. Assembly election 2026: a high-profile contest brews in Chennai’s Mylapore
content: Constituency reflects broader urban churn with residents pointing out civic woes even as national parties look for gains in Tamil Nadu

title: Poor delivery of schemes, lack of support for farm sector, major talking points in Madurantakam constituency
content: Farmers say that during the peak season, the DPCs find it difficult to process and move the large volume of paddy that they deposit there. Payments are often delayed too, sometimes for over a month to three months. Irulars in the constituency say they face stigmatisation and live in abject poverty

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election 2026: Familiar foes trying to recover lost ground in State’s southern districts
content: The AIADMK is facing a two-pronged attack from its former coordinator O. Panneerselvam and former interim general secretary V.K. Sasikala; while the former, now with the DMK, has addressed 40 meetings in the southern region, the latter, who now heads the AIPTMMK, will begin her tour today

title: Jayakanthan’s ‘Cinemavukku Pona Chitthalu’: on the influence of film personalities on the masses
content: Jayakanthan’s novella, ‘Cinemavukku Pona Chitthalu,’ explores the impact of film culture on identity and social dynamics through the story of Kamsalai, a devoted admirer of Tamil cinema icon M.G. Ramachandran (MGR). Set in Chennai, the narrative captures a time when MGR’s influence shaped Tamil Nadu’s political landscape.

title: Trump threatens fire and fury as Vance talks peace in Pakistan
content: vice-president JD Vance began talks with an obdurate Iranian team . there was no word from Islamabad about any progress in the talk . he kept up a barrage of social media posts during the talks, attacking everyone from Iran to European nations .

title: Bengaluru-Mumbai Vande Bharat sleeper train gets railways’ nod; full schedule soon
content: Suchith Kidiyoor is an Assistant Editor with The Times of India, Bengaluru, bringing over 15 years of journalistic experience. A keen observer of the city’s evolving landscape, he specializes in covering urban mobility, infrastructure, traffic management, urban planning, and public policy. Known for his in-depth reporting, he also closely follows developments within the Karnataka government, including affairs at the state secretariat and sessions of the legislature. Read More

title: US-Israel-Iran War LIVE Updates: JD Vance Says No Breakthrough In US-Iran Peace Talks
content: Iran's Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf has arrived in Islamabad for peace talks with US, JD Vance is said to be en route.

title: Mob Attacks, Vandalises Hindu Households, Businesses In Bangladesh
content: An irate mob attacked several Hindu households and businesses in pre-dawn hours over the death of a Muslim youth in their neighbourhood in Rangpur, about 300-odd kms northwest of Dhaka.

title: Centre Hikes Export Duty On Diesel To Rs 55.5 Per Litre, Jet Fuel To Rs 42
content: The government had, on March 26, imposed an export duty of Rs 21.50 a litre on diesel, and Rs 29.5 per litre on Aviation Turbine Fuel (ATF).

title: Indian-Born Cheetah KGP-2 Gives Birth To 4 Cubs In Kuno National Park
content: At present, Kuno National Park is home to 54 cheetahs, including adults and cubs, while three others are roaming freely in the Gandhi Sagar Sanctuary in Mandsaur.

title: 13 Killed, 30 Injured In Massive Highway Pile-Up In Bihar
content: Those travelling in the pickup van were coming from the neighbouring Purnea district, said a local police official adding that the bus driver also suffered severe injuries.

title: Bhopal's Infamous 90-Degree Bridge To Be Redesigned After Months of Outrage
content: The controversial 90-degree Railway Overbridge in Bhopal's Aishbagh, which has been mocked across the country for its 'faulty design', will now be redesigned and opened to the public.

title: Wedding A Day Ago, Family Now Preps For 4 Funerals After Highway Accident
content: Eyewitnesses described scenes of chaos and horror, as the mangled auto lay buried beneath the overturned truck

title: Peace Talks Begin In Pakistan, Donald Trump Calls Iran "Failing Nation"
content: Trilateral ceasefire talks between the United States, Iran and Pakistan have started in Islamabad. The two countries still appeared to be far apart on key issues such as sanctions, Lebanon, and the opening of the strategic Strait of Hormuz.

title: US Retail Inflation Jumps To 2-Year High Over Iran War's Economic Shock
content: The US has spent millions of dollars on military operations, and the economy has begun to show warning signs in retail inflation, particularly in energy.

title: Pakistani 5-Star Hotel Becomes Unlikely Site For US-Iran Talks
content: The luxury five-star Serena Hotel in Pakistan's capital has become the unlikely venue for peace talks aimed at ending the Iran war, cementing its status as one of Islamabad's most heavily fortified buildings.

title: 1st Indian Vessel Crosses Strait Of Hormuz After US-Iran Ceasefire
content: Ship tracking data showed the tanker moved through the strategic waterway between Friday night and Saturday morning and was located in the Gulf of Oman, east of the Strait on Saturday afternoon, proceeding eastwards.

title: Israel Strikes South Lebanon As Iran Pushes For Ceasefire In Pakistan
content: Israel is carrying out large-scale air attacks in southern Lebanon amid peace talks in Islamabad, as Iran insists on including Lebanon in any ceasefire deal.

title: BMW Flattened After Truck Falls On It In Andhra, High Court Lawyer Killed
content: According to preliminaryreports, the tanker, which was carrying ready-mix concrete, lost control while turning because of brake failure.

title: Poll Body Withdraws Key Appointment In Tamil Nadu After DMK's 'Biased' Barb
content: The Election Commission said in its new order that Sandeep Mittal will continue as the Director General of Police (Armed Police).

title: Odisha IAS Officer Cheats Man Of Rs 95 Lakh, Then Gives Death Threats
content: Aradhana Das is accused of cheating a complainant named Kamal Kumar Bhawsinka, a differently-abled person, by taking Rs 95 lakh on the promise of providing land.

title: 'Only They Can Play That Role': S Tharoor's Jab At Pak Over US-Iran Talks
content: "There have been allegations that Washington wrote that tweet for the Pakistani prime minister," Shashi Tharoor said

title: After 28 Years As BJP Peon, Ramesh Bhil Gets Ticket For Civic Election
content: In a move that has become a major talking point in the Mehsana Municipal Corporation elections, BJP has granted a ticket to Ramesh Bhil, a dedicated staff member who has served as a peon at the Mehsana District BJP office.

title: Amid Bombing In Lebanon, Sanitation Workers Keep Streets Alive
content: At first light, with the sounds and smoke of overnight explosions still in the air, a small municipal truck drives into a deserted street in Tyre, a coastal town in south Lebanon. Men in fluorescent vests climb down, moving quickly past buildings red

title: Watch: PM Modi, Rahul Gandhi's Rare Candid Chat In Parliament Complex
content: The PM and the Congress MP were among leaders who had gathered at the Parliament complex to pay tribute to social reformer Mahatma Jyotirao Phule.

title: 2026 rankings: Profiles for more than 30 tight ends
content: Mike Clay is revealing his fantasy football rookie rankings at each key offensive position . the rankings do not include rookies because we are unsure of their landing spots . he trails only Ja'Marr Chase in targets (317) and receptions (2,385) .

title: Women's transfer rankings for 2026-27 season
content: the women's college basketball transfer portal opened Monday with a tidal wave of activity . more than 1,300 players are looking for new homes . the portal closes April 20 but players' decisions for their next school can still come after that .

title: Men's transfer rankings: The top 60 players in the portal right now
content: more than 1,000 men's basketball players added their names to the transfer portal . the portal drew around 2,100 players in 2024 and nearly 2,700 players last year . most coaches expect this season's portal entrants to surpass the 3,000 mark .

title: Senator contacts leagues over 'gambling's ugly takeover'
content: senator sends letters to six league commissioners raising concerns about "gambling's ugly takeover of sports" he asks the leagues to provide information by may 1 about their partnerships with both sportsbooks and prediction markets . he says the growing prediction market space has "only made the problem wow"

title: Spring game previews: Alabama, Florida among ones to note Saturday
content: nine power 4 schools hold an event on saturday, April 11 . it's spring game season in the world of college football with four games . a quarterback battle at Alabama between Austin Mack and Keelon Russell .

title: Options for Rangers if Wyatt Langford misses time
content: fantasy baseball buzz file aims to provide fantasy managers with the intel they need as news breaks around MLB . the team may be without starting catcher Gabriel Moreno after leaving last night's series opener with lower back tightness .

title: Roman Reigns' Top 10 WrestleMania main events: Which match finished No. 1?
content: Roman Reigns will challenge CM Punk at WrestleMania 42 Night 2 on April 18 at Allegiant Stadium in Las Vegas for the world heavyweight championship in his 11th main event . he defeated Brock Lesnar at the "Winner Take All" main event between lesnar and thera .

title: WNBA free agency and trade tracker: Skylar Diggins to Sky, Satou Sabally to Liberty
content: the WNBA and players' association verbally agreed to a new collective bargaining agreement on march 18 . it meant the league would have to conduct an expansion draft, free agency and the draft in a compressed offseason before the 30th season tips off May 8 . the negotiating period of free agency is underway through Friday after teams sent out qualifying offers and core designations .

title: Liverpool player ratings: 17-year-old Ngumoha's 9/10 performance creates dilemma for Slot
content: Liverpool beat Fulham 2-0 at anfield on saturday . the hosts will stay fifth in the premier league by the end of this weekend . manager arne slot believes he still has the support from fans .

title: NHL playoff watch: What's at stake in all 15 games on Saturday
content: two weeks from Saturday, the opening faceoff of the 2026 Stanley Cup playoffs will occur on the networks of ESPN . as of now, nine spots have been clinched, including the no. 1 overall seed in the league and the Metro Division title . but that leaves seven more up for grabs, with 15 games on the schedule .

title: Wings sign defensive ace Smith to 3-year deal
content: free agent alanna Smith agrees to a three-year max contract with the Dallas Wings . the 6-foot-4 forward was a defensive standout for the Minnesota Lynx in 2025 . she earned co-Defensive Player of the Year honors alongside A'ja Wilson . her agent says she is the team's "top target" in free agency .

title: 'I bleed orange and black': How Rick Tocchet steered the Flyers back into the playoff race
content: tocchet was hired as flyers coach last summer after playing 621 games with Philly . fans were critical of how he chose to deploy young star Matvei Michkov . he shook off digs that his rigid system wasn't aesthetically pleasing . there's an online petition calling for him to develop young talent .

title: UFC 327 expert picks: How can Procházka reclaim the light heavyweight title?
content: Ji Procházka takes on Carlos Ulberg in the UFC 327 main event . the current light heavyweight champion is vacating the belt to move up and fight against Ciryl Gane for the interim heavyweight championship at the white house in June . Ulberg is ranked no. 3 in ESPN's divisional rankings .

title: What the DOJ's NFL investigation could mean for networks, fans
content: the federal government has opened a probe into whether the NFL is harming consumers in the way it sells its broadcast rights . a growing chorus of lawmakers and fans have expressed concern over the NFL and other leagues putting more games on subscription streaming services, leading to potentially increased costs for viewers . the probe is unclear, but the NFL has a limited antitrust exemption as part of the Sports Broadcasting Act of 1961 .
